name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Removed (Windows)
notes: This Building Block detects permission removed from a Superuser group. An adversary may strip off high privileges to prevent mitigation actions from administrators.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Removed (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Removed
when the event matches Group Name (custom) is any of Administrators
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Removed (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Removed
AND when the event matches Group Name (custom) is any of Administrators
